free_text: Production of strong, high-energy neutron fluxes in a
cyclotron by irradiating thick lithium and beryllium
Thick lithium and beryllium targets ware used.
"all-wave" detector with a BF3 counter of the
SNM-5 type for measuring the absolute yields of
neutrons of all energies in the direction 0.degr.
relative to the irradiating deuteron beam.
